misc: Primary organizer of the Hector Trophée event.
biography: Toni stands as the foundational figure of the Hector Trophée, a tournament he has diligently nurtured from its inception as its primary organizer. Residing at Hirsala Golf, his influence extends far beyond mere administration; he has been an ever-present force on the fairways, having participated in every single iteration of this prestigious event since its debut.

His competitive record is as distinguished as his organizational efforts. Toni has steered his pairs to victory and claimed the coveted Hector Trophée on three separate occasions, a testament to his strategic prowess and ability to perform under pressure. Furthermore, his individual brilliance has shone through with two Victor Trophy triumphs, marking him as one of the most decorated players in the tournament's history. These accolades underscore a remarkable duality: excelling both in the intricate logistical dance of organizing a major golf event and in the demanding arena of competitive play.

As the Hector Trophée 2026 approaches, Toni is set to mark his thirteenth consecutive appearance, a testament to his unwavering dedication to the sport and this unique competition. His continued presence promises not only a meticulously organized event but also the enduring thrill of witnessing a true titan of the Trophée in action once more.
